scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');const pub='public';fs.mkdirSync(pub,{recursive:true});['node_modules/@ricky0123/vad-web/dist/silero_vad_legacy.onnx','node_modules/@ricky0123/vad-web/dist/silero_vad_v5.onnx','node_modules/@ricky0123/vad-web/dist/vad.worklet.bundle.min.js','node_modules/onnxruntime-web/dist/ort-wasm-simd-threaded.wasm','node_modules/onnxruntime-web/dist/ort-wasm-simd.wasm'].forEach(f=>{const dest=p.join(pub,p.basename(f));if(!fs.existsSync(dest))fs.copyFileSync(f,dest)});console.log('VAD assets copied to public/')"
